alerts.title: Iran nuclear breakout time estimated at 1-2 weeks amid negotiations
alerts.summary: Global metrics confirm Iran's uranium enrichment at 60% U-235 with breakout timeline compressed to approximately 1-2 weeks. This represents imminent nuclear weapons capability threshold occurring concurrently with active US-Iran negotiations in Bürgenstock, creating acute strategic risk (global_metrics).

alerts.title: Israel continues Beirut strikes despite Trump administration warning
alerts.summary: Israel conducted fresh airstrikes on Beirut's southern suburbs, killing at least 3 civilians, and struck southern Lebanon killing 2 more including sea turtle conservationist Mona Khalil. Operations continue despite Trump's explicit earlier warnings against escalation and risk triggering Iranian retaliation (incidents).

alerts.title: Iran and Oman establish joint Strait of Hormuz administration with maritime fees
alerts.summary: Middle East Spectator reports (~51K views, confirmed/breaking flags) that Iran and Oman released joint statement establishing shared governance over Strait of Hormuz with new maritime service fees per international standards. Rubio responded that US will not permit toll charges under any final deal, indicating diplomatic flashpoint (telegram, incidents).

alerts.title: Pakistan PM claims Iran agreed to future ballistic missile negotiations
alerts.summary: Middle East Spectator reports (~44K views) Pakistan's PM Shehbaz Sharif announced Iran has agreed to hold negotiations on its ballistic missile program in the future. Represents potential diplomatic opening on weapons systems previously off-limits in talks (telegram).

alerts.title: US sentiment on Iran remains negative amid 'Trump-Iran deal' discourse
alerts.summary: US sentiment holds 49% negative vs 45% positive with 'trump' (55 mentions) and 'iran' (19 mentions) as top words alongside 'war,' 'deal,' and 'powers.' Rubio appears prominently in discourse. Persistent negative sentiment despite negotiation window suggests public skepticism of diplomatic resolution (sentiment).

analysis_note: Critical juncture: Iran's nuclear breakout window has collapsed to 1-2 weeks while US-Iran negotiations proceed in Bürgenstock, overlaid by Israeli continued strikes in Lebanon and emerging Iran-Oman maritime governance challenge to US interests.
